mapper.select: SELECT l.warehouse_id AS warehouseId, w.warehouse_name AS warehouseName, SUM(i.quantity) AS totalQuantity, COUNT(DISTINCT i.product_id) AS productTypes FROM inventory i LEFT JOIN location l ON i.location_id = l.id LEFT JOIN warehouse w ON l.warehouse_id = w.id GROUP BY l.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_name ORDER BY totalQuantity DESC

SELECT i.product_id AS productId, p.name AS productName, p.product_code AS productCode, SUM(i.quantity) AS totalQuantity FROM inventory i LEFT JOIN product p ON i.product_id = p.id GROUP BY i.product_id, p.name, p.product_code ORDER BY totalQuantity DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT i.product_id AS productId, p.name AS productName, p.product_code AS productCode, SUM(i.quantity) AS currentQuantity, #{threshold} AS minStock, 1000 AS maxStock, (CASE WHEN SUM(i.quantity) < #{threshold} THEN #{threshold} - SUM(i.quantity) ELSE 0 END) AS shortage FROM inventory i LEFT JOIN product p ON i.product_id = p.id GROUP BY i.product_id, p.name, p.product_code HAVING SUM(i.quantity) < #{threshold} ORDER BY currentQuantity ASC
